title: Solar Thermal Installers and Technicians
description: Install or repair solar energy systems designed to collect, store, and circulate solar-heated water for residential, commercial or industrial use.

tasks.text: Test operation or functionality of mechanical, plumbing, electrical, and control systems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Apply weather seal, such as pipe flashings and sealants, to roof penetrations and structural devices.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install solar collector mounting devices on tile, asphalt, shingle, or built-up gravel roofs, using appropriate materials and penetration methods.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install copper or plastic plumbing using pipes, fittings, pipe cutters, acetylene torches, solder, wire brushes, sand cloths, flux, plastic pipe cleaners, or plastic glue.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Identify plumbing, electrical, environmental, or safety hazards associated with solar thermal installations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Demonstrate start-up, shut-down, maintenance, diagnostic, and safety procedures to thermal system owners.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install circulating pumps using pipe, fittings, soldering equipment, electrical supplies, and hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install flat-plat, evacuated glass, or concentrating solar collectors on mounting devices, using brackets or struts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install solar thermal system controllers and sensors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Fill water tanks and check tanks, pipes, and fittings for leaks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Design active direct or indirect, passive direct or indirect, or pool solar systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Determine locations for installing solar subsystem components, including piping, water heaters, valves, and ancillary equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform routine maintenance or repairs to restore solar thermal systems to baseline operating conditions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Install heat exchangers and heat exchanger fluids according to installation manuals and schematics.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Apply operation or identification tags or labels to system components, as required.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Connect water heaters and storage tanks to power and water sources.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Cut, miter, and glue piping insulation to insulate plumbing pipes and fittings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install plumbing, such as dip tubes, port fittings, drain tank valves, pressure temperature relief valves, or tanks, according to manufacturer specifications and building codes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install monitoring system components, such as flow meters, temperature gauges, and pressure gauges, according to system design and manufacturer specifications.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assess collector sites to ensure structural integrity of potential mounting surfaces or the best orientation and tilt for solar collectors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Apply ultraviolet radiation protection to prevent degradation of plumbing.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
